calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Date On Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar May-02-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
E. Michael Linscheid, Esq., 415-225-1466, for petitioner and moving party Sean Fruth
M. Rebeca Mendoza, Deputy Attorney General, 510-622-2211, for respondent and opposing party Department of Motor Vehicles

RULING:
A R G U E D; PETITIONER SEAN FRUTH'S Hearing Date On Petition For Writ Of Mandate is taken UNDER SUBMISSION. The Court requested that each counsel submit a 3 page memorandum by 3/25/05; plaintiff to address the Downer case and why strict compliance; defense counsel to address issue re waiting period of blood testing machine-discuss Martinez case. Counsel shall submit proposed forms of order. (301/AJR/AC) Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620
